ab: I loma’ay kiso ha Lapic?
en: Lapic, are you home?

ab: Hai, kapicomod.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Lapic, i loma’ay kiso?
en: Lapic, are you home?

ab: Awaay i loma’ ciLapic! ciYoing kako, nimaan saw? tahaloma’ to ciLapic sowal han to ako.
ch: B:Lapic不在家耶!我是Yoing，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Lapic。
en: Lapic is not at home. I am Yoing. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: Cima kamo?
en: Who are you?

ab: Fofo, ciYoing ato ci Hongay kami, fohaten ho ko fawahan.
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Yoing 和 Hongay，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Yoing and Hongay, please open the door for us.

ab: Cima saw?
en: Who is it?

ab: CiRofing kako, mikilimay kako ci Idawan.
en: I am Rofing, I am here for Idawan.

ab: Fofo, tayniay kami miliso’ tisowanan.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: Wata kahalafin caka tayni kiso, ma’ilol to kako tisowanan.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Lapic, misalama kita.
en: Lapic, I am here to play with you.

ab: Kapicomod, halafin to ko pitatala ako tisowanan.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: O nipalomaan ako kona konga, tanamen a komaen!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: Sakoesan sa kona konga.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: Pohay! O nipalomaan ako kona losay, tanamen a komaen.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: Sakoesan sa kaenen kona losay.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Kamaro’! O nipalomaan ako kona ’ariray to cowa kasiwtoken, tanamen a komaen!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: Wa! Sakoesan sa a kaenen.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: Komaen kiso to ’asilo haw?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: Cowa kanga’ay kako komaen to ’asilo, o lonko sa ko kaenen no mako.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: Komaen kiso to ’odax haw?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: Hai, maolahay kako.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: Podacen no mako ko losay to kakaenen iso.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: Ahowiday, makasalang kona losay.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: Pananomen ako kiso.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: Ahowiday.
en: Thank you.

ab: Adihayen ko nikaenan, adihay ko nisafelan ako a dateng.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: Wa! safangsis sa mato ka’esoay a kaenen.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: Adihayen ko nikaenan, ira ini ko adihayay.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: Awaay to ko ngodo ako yo!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: Adihayen ko nikaenan, ira ini ko adihayay.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: Adihay to ko nikaenan no mako, cato kanga’ay a komaen.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
